title: Bridgton Hub the Switch champs
description: CRICKET NEWS - The Bridgton Hub team has...
bodyText:
> The Rosemoor Hub was dismissed for only 33, after which Bridgton only needed two overs to knock off the target.


In the boys U19 final, which will be contested at the Rec Cricket Stadium today, Thursday 13 November, the defending champions, Bridgton Hub, will face Outeniqua High.

Bridgton defeated York High by 23 runs in the semi-final, while Outeniqua High was victorious by 111 runs against Glenwood House.

The summarised scorecards are:

Girls U19 final:

Bridgton Hub beat Rosemoor Hub with 10 wickets:

Outeniqua High School beat Glenwood House with 111 runs:

Bridgton Hub beat York High School by 23 runs:

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
